items.title: VI Live: Schwalbe kost Rodríguez tweede gele kaart, Utrecht met tien man verder
items.summary: Zondagmiddag om 12.15 uur staan FC Utrecht en Feyenoord tegenover elkaar in de Eredivisie. Beide ploegen zijn de afgelopen weken flink aan het kwakkelen, waardoor er voor zowel Ron Jans als voor Robin van Persie druk op dit duel staat. Volg de wedstrijd in deze VI Live.

items.title: Arsenal v Manchester City: Women’s Super League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from Emirates Stadium, kick off 12pm (GMT) ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Xaymaca 3 min: Caitlin Foord turns Kerstin Casparij inside out on the left. She drives towards the byline before crossing the ball across the box. Nobody’s there to tap the ball in though. 1 min: Former Arsenal player Vivianne Miedema has an early opportunity. Manchester City win the ball off Arsenal shortly after kick off and Miedema strikes from about 25 yards out. It travels comfortably past the post. Continue reading...

items.title: Liverpool v Manchester City buildup, Premier League reaction and WSL – matchday live
items.summary: ⚽ Latest news and reaction before Sunday’s fixtures ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Daniel Former Liverpool midfielder Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain signed for Celtic yesterday. Celtic manager Martin O’Neill said: We are really pleased to bring Alex to Celtic. He still has so much to offer the game, and I am sure he can add another dimension to us with his great ability and wealth of experience in the game. Continue reading...

items.title: Mojica claimt overwicht op Yamal die voor zesde keer op rij tot MOTM wordt gekozen
items.summary: De opvallendste claim van het weekend gaat naar Johan Mojica, verdediger van Mallorca. Met zijn ploeg ging de Colombiaan met duidelijke cijfers onderuit op bezoek bij Barcelona ( 3-0 ) maar aan hem had dat niet gelegen, vond Mojica. De linksback had Lamine Yamal naar eigen zeggen in zijn broekzak.

items.title: VI Live: Boel en Correia doen het anders in kwakkelkraker in Deventer
items.summary: Zondag staat ons een fraaie voetbaldag te wachten. De duels van Feyenoord, Ajax en PSV volgen we in aparte liveblogs, maar in deze VI Live blijf je op de hoogte van alle andere duels. Bijvoorbeeld van de Engelse topper tussen Liverpool en Manchester City.

items.title: Low energy, low confidence - Newcastle at worst moment since Saudi takeover
items.summary: Saturday night’s post-match press conference at Newcastle felt like a big moment for Eddie Howe. It felt emotional – and he picked his words very carefully after the defeat to Brentford.

items.title: VI Live: twee wijzigingen bij AZ voor duel met Ajax
items.summary: AZ neemt het zondagmiddag om 14.30 uur andermaal op tegen Ajax. De Alkmaarders stonden een kleine maand geleden ook al tegenover Ajax, dat zich wil revancheren voor de pijnlijke 6-0 nederlaag in de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker. Volg de Eredivisie-ontmoeting tussen AZ en Ajax in deze VI Live.

items.title: Opstelling Ajax: Grim kiest opnieuw voor Sutalo tegen AZ, Wijndal terug
items.summary: Fred Grim heeft zijn opstelling voor het duel met AZ uit de doeken gedaan. De Ajax-trainer kiest centraal achterin opnieuw voor Josip Sutalo in plaats van Aaron Bouwman. Owen Wijndal keert terug in de basis. Winterversterking Oleksandr Zinchenko zit voor het eerst bij de selectie. Hij begint op de bank.

items.title: FREE WSL STREAMS: Liverpool vs Aston Villa, London City vs Everton, West Ham vs Brighton
Scorecard: England vs Nepal, T20 World Cup, Mumbai
Nepal need 10 from final over to stun England at T20 World Cup LIVE!
‘It has changed my life’: Wrexham’s Hollywood takeover, five years on
items.summary: When Ryan Reynolds and Rob Mac became club guardians in 2021 the Premier League was a dream. Now it’s a target Two Chewbaccas handed out flyers to passersby. No one making their way towards the Turf batted an eyelid, but then again, for five years now, a touch of Hollywood has become pretty much the norm in Wrexham. Ninety minutes before kick-off the city’s most famous public house was heaving. Lying in the shadow of the Racecourse Ground, it is the watering hole of choice for locals, and, thanks to landlord Wayne Jones’s prominent role in Welcome to Wrexham, the hit documentary following the club’s many fortunes, a tourist attraction. Continue reading...

items.title: The new top-flight Canadian club inspired by Athletic Bilbao
items.summary: Supra du Quebec kick off their inaugural Canadian Premier League in April and will field only players born or raised in the province.

items.title: How Ekitike has already become a Liverpool cult hero
items.summary: Inside the rise of Hugo Ekitike, adapting to life in England, connecting with Florian Wirtz and why he's already a fan favourite.

items.title: Liverpool signing Jacquet suffers 'serious' injury
items.summary: Liverpool 's new summer signing Jérémy Jacquet has sustained a "serious" shoulder injury, according to Rennes head coach Habib Beye.

items.title: Foxborough demands clarity on $8M WC funding
items.summary: Town officials in Foxborough, Massachusetts, are seeking clarity on the source of around $8 million they say is needed to fund public safety for this summer's World Cup games at Gillette Stadium, the home of the New England Patriots.

items.title: Wrexham hero Mullin hits out at club after exit
items.summary: Paul Mullin has hit out at parent club Wrexham, saying he's "never going to accept" the way he was frozen out of the team over the past 18 months.

items.title: Messi scores solo golazo in Miami preseason draw
items.summary: Lionel Messi scored a trademark solo goal and added an assist for new signing Germán Berterame as Inter Miami drew 2-2 with Barcelona SC in a preseason friendly in Quito, Ecuador, on Saturday.

items.title: How did Arsenal 'unlock' Sunderland's defence?
items.summary: Match of the Day pundit Alan Shearer explains how a "piece of brilliance" combined with effective substitutions allowed Arsenal to break down Sunderland's defence, in their 3-0 home win in the Premier League.

items.title: 'I'm not doing my job well enough' - but is Howe now under pressure?
items.summary: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe admitted he is "not doing my job well enough" after Saturday's defeat by Brentford - but is he under pressure?
